title: microseris attenuata var. parvula
intro: Microseris attenuata var. parvula, also known as the western needlegrass or prairie needlegrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Microseris attenuata var. parvula include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
